item.name: Bronze Trout
item.description:
This large freshwater fish has indeed come to resemble its eponymous lake after long years of inhabiting its waters.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: The scales of this distinctive trout range from a deep olive green to a gleaming bronze brown. Its crimson flesh is highly sought after by fishermen, who equate the darker hue with a richer─and thus more expensive─flavor.
